indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for placing a yoga mat.

indicators.name: floor lamp
indicators.rationale: A floor lamp can create a warm, ambient lighting but may also cast shadows that could disrupt the practice.

indicators.name: wall art
indicators.rationale: Wall art can be visually distracting and may not be suitable for a calming yoga environment.

indicators.name: cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets can limit the available floor space and may not be suitable for a yoga practice.

indicators.name: bookshelves
indicators.rationale: Bookshelves can limit the available floor space and may not be suitable for a yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The hardwood flooring and floor lamp provide a suitable foundation for yoga practice, but the presence of wall art, cabinets, and bookshelves limits the available floor space and may create visual distractions. The score of 3 reflects the mixed suitability of the space for yoga, with some positive aspects but significant negative factors.
